subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon and turnest thy face towards the Abha Kingdom! Thy numerous letters have been read and their contents understood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر و متوجه بملکوت ابهی مکاتیب متعدده آنجناب قرائت شد و مضامین مفهوم و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @consultation
